title: carduncellus sennenii
intro: Carduncellus sennenii, also known as Sennen's cardoon, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It belongs to the thistle family and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health problems, including ulcers, diarrhea, and arthritis, due to its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. Carduncellus sennenii can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal benefits and alleviate various health issues.
